title: Sword Variants
description: Adds a bunch of new weapons and others.
body:
This mod's purpose is to add new weapons to Minecraft because I felt that there weren't enough. It adds swords and ranged weapons. There will be more weapons in future updates as well.
List of what could be added:
 - More Swords
 - Ores
 - More ranged weapons
 - New projectiles
And more as I think.
